channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Parents push Congress to act on kids' online safety after juries find Meta and YouTube liable for harm
item.description: Roughly 70 parents traveled to the U.S. Capitol to push for online safety legislation after juries found Meta and YouTube liable for harming children.

item.title: Leavitt explains why Iran's seizure of two ships doesn't violate Trump's ceasefire
item.description: The White House says Iran seizing two ships in the Strait of Hormuz is not a ceasefire violation because they were not U.S. or Israeli vessels.

item.title: US Seizes Iranian Oil Ship, CENTCOM Levels Media Narrative About Blockade
Rep. Jason Smith to Newsmax: Dems Ignore $60 Billion Medicare Fraud
item.description: It's shocking that Democrat lawmakers aren't taking widespread Medicare fraud seriously, Rep. Jason Smith, R-Mo., told Newsmax on Thursday.

item.title: Asst DHS Secretary for Counterterrorism Placed on Administrative Leave, and the Reason Why Is a Doozy
Trump Reclassifies Medical Marijuana as Less Dangerous
item.description: President Donald Trump's acting attorney general on Thursday signed an order reclassifying state-licensed medical marijuana as a less-dangerous drug, ...

item.title: Xavier Becerra pressed on 'rumors' he knew about Eric Swalwell's alleged misconduct during CA governor debate
item.description: Xavier Becerra was pressed on his knowledge of Eric Swalwell's sexual misconduct rumors during a California gubernatorial debate Wednesday.

item.title: Trump admin loosens regulations on state-licensed medical marijuana
item.description: President Donald Trump's administration loosened federal regulations on state-licensed marijuana on Thursday.

item.title: Rep. Donalds to Newsmax: Va. Ruling Blocks 'Insane' Maps Push
item.description: A Virginia judge's decision to strike down a redistricting referendum temporarily halts what he described as an aggressive Democratic Party effort to ...

item.title: US to Speed Up Medicare Payments for Medical Devices
item.description: Health regulators in the U.S. are set to announce a program to speed up federal payments for new medical devices for people insured by Medicare, the F...

item.title: Omar Winery Listed at Millions Dissolves Days Later As House Oversight Presses for Answers
Democrats Dig in Against ICE As GOP Forces Funding Showdown
Rep. McDowell to Newsmax: GOP Must Fund DHS Without Dems
item.description: House Republicans will need to fund fully the Department of Homeland Security without Democrats who "don't want to do anything to help us," Rep. Addis...

item.title: MN lawmaker takes action to get answers on Omar's alleged fraud ties after she skips key hearing: 'Ghosted us'
item.description: Rep. Ilhan Omar faces scrutiny after skipping a Minnesota hearing on her potential links to the massive Feeding Our Future pandemic fraud probe.
